title: Drop PPID Instance Isolation + Add browse instances Command
overview: Remove broken PPID-based instance auto-detection. Default to one server per project directory — sessions handle agent isolation. Add browse instances command so agents can discover running servers.
scopeChallenge: PPID auto-detection was architecturally wrong. It tried to solve multi-agent isolation at the server level, but sessions already solve it at the context level. The fix is to stop auto-detecting and let sessions do their job.

failureModes.risk: Old PPID-suffixed state files remain on disk
failureModes.mitigation: cleanOrphanedServers still cleans files with dead PIDs

failureModes.risk: Health check timeout on dead server

tasks.title: Clean up PPID dead code and simplify orphan cleanup
tasks.description: Remove IS_COMPILED (dead). Simplify cleanOrphanedServers() — no PPID suffix logic needed. Keep port-based suffix detection for BROWSE_PORT instances.
acceptanceCriteria: bun test passes, bun run build succeeds

tasks.title: Add browse instances local command
tasks.description: Add listInstances() to cli.ts. Scans .browse/ for browse-server*.json, health-checks each, reports instance/PID/port/status/sessions. Local command — no server needed.
acceptanceCriteria: browse instances lists running servers with PID/port/status
Dead servers show as dead and get cleaned up

tasks.title: Update help text and SKILL.md
tasks.description: Add instances to help text. Update SKILL.md with instances command and multi-instance isolation model.
